items.title: VideoChat3: Fully Open Video MLLM for Efficient and Generalist Video Understanding
items.summary: VideoChat3 introduces a new fully open-source video Multi-modal Large Language Model (MLLM) designed for efficient and generalist video understanding, offering significant advancements in the field.

items.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
items.summary: Databricks has achieved a staggering $188 billion valuation, solidifying its position as a key player in the AI ecosystem by providing essential data and analytics infrastructure.

items.title: The agent security gap: 54% of enterprises have already had an AI agent incident, and most still let agents share credentials
items.summary: A new report reveals a significant 'agent security gap,' with over half of enterprises experiencing an AI agent-related security incident and many still allowing agents to share sensitive credentials.

items.title: LongStraw: Long-Context RL Beyond 2M Tokens under a Fixed GPU Budget
items.summary: Researchers have developed 'LongStraw,' a new method enabling Reinforcement Learning (RL) to handle contexts exceeding 2 million tokens while operating within a fixed GPU budget, addressing a major limitation in long-sequence processing.

items.title: SEED: Self-Evolving On-Policy Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: The SEED framework proposes a novel approach for agentic reinforcement learning that uses self-evolving on-policy distillation to improve learning efficiency and agent performance.

items.title: The AI compute gap: Enterprises are buying infrastructure faster than they can measure what it costs
items.summary: Enterprises are rapidly acquiring AI compute infrastructure, creating a 'compute gap' where they struggle to accurately measure and manage the associated costs.

items.title: SearchOS-V1: Towards Robust Open-Domain Information-Seeking Agent Collaboration
items.summary: SearchOS-V1 introduces a new framework aimed at fostering robust collaboration among open-domain information-seeking agents, enhancing their ability to work together effectively.

items.title: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs
items.summary: Vertu is marketing a high-priced AI agent for executives at $6,880, prompting scrutiny into its actual performance and value proposition for business leaders.

items.title: Experiments with On-device AI — What building on Gemini Nano actually teaches you
items.summary: This article shares practical insights and lessons learned from developing applications using Google's Gemini Nano, highlighting the realities of on-device AI implementation.

items.title: BadWAM: When World-Action Models Dream Right but Act Wrong
items.summary: A new paper explores the phenomenon of 'BadWAM,' where World-Action Models accurately predict outcomes but fail to execute correct actions, highlighting a critical challenge in agentic AI.

items.title: OriginBlame: Record- and Token-Level Data Provenance for AI Training Datasets
items.summary: OriginBlame proposes a novel system for tracking data provenance at both record and token levels within AI training datasets, crucial for transparency and accountability.

items.title: SPINE: Bridging the Cyber-Physical Gap with Agentic AI
items.summary: SPINE presents an innovative approach to bridge the gap between cyber and physical systems using agentic AI, promising more integrated and intelligent control over real-world environments.

items.title: The AI context gap: Enterprise AI organizations have a trust problem, not a retrieval problem — and most are still building the fix
items.summary: Enterprise AI organizations face a 'context gap' rooted in trust issues rather than retrieval failures, with many still working to implement solutions to build confidence in AI outputs.

items.title: RoboTTT: Context Scaling for Robot Policies
items.summary: RoboTTT introduces a method for context scaling in robot policies, enabling more complex and adaptable behaviors for robotic systems by handling larger contextual information.

items.title: Create, edit and star in videos with two Google Vids updates
items.summary: Google Vids has received two new updates, empowering users to create, edit, and feature themselves in videos more easily, leveraging AI for enhanced content creation.
